violations.description: Dispensing equipment - Design and construction. — --Equipment * that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not properly designed and/or constructed to prevent contamination. - Ice machine was leaking water.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sink with a least three compartments was not provided for manual cleaning, rinsing, and sanitizing of equipment/utensils. - No 3 compartment Sink
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. - No hand sink

General premises. — --Items unnecessary * for the operation and maintenance of the food establishment were being stored on the premises. - Kithcen is being used for food prep while construction is ongoing. Exposed studs and cut dry wall.
Mobile food service establishment. — --Water supply system was not designed, constructed, and/or maintained in a manner to prevent contamination. - No water supply to the kitchen
